channel.title: GitHub on Miles Wallace
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub on Miles Wallace

item.title: Building a Hugo Website with GitHub
item.author: mileswallace@lavabit.com
item.description: “Building a Hugo Website with GitHub.” 03/05/2023 Hugo is one of the fundamental static site generators to install because it’s distributed as a single binary. Install Hugo on your local machine. You can download the latest version of Hugo from the official website: https://gohugo.io/getting-started/installing/. Create a new Hugo site using the command line interface by typing the following command in your terminal or command prompt: hugo new site your-site-name This will create a new Hugo site in a folder named your-site-name.

item.title: Building a Hugo Website with GitHub
item.author: mileswallace@lavabit.com
item.description: “Building a Hugo Website with GitHub.” 03/05/2023 Hugo is one of the fundamental static site generators to install because it’s distributed as a single binary. Install Hugo on your local machine. You can download the latest version of Hugo from the official website: https://gohugo.io/getting-started/installing/. Create a new Hugo site using the command line interface by typing the following command in your terminal or command prompt: hugo new site your-site-name This will create a new Hugo site in a folder named your-site-name.
